step_rationale: Lipid species associated with calcified plaque; marker of plaque mineral deposition.
mechanism: Diacylglycerol 18:1_20:0 is a lipid biomarker of calcified coronary atherosclerotic plaque, reflecting advanced lesion mineralization.

references.title: Variability of the Plasma Lipidome and Subclinical Coronary Atherosclerosis.
